title: 10 best herbal teas for acne
description: Curcuma longa teas helps with acne because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The active compound curcumin, found in the tea, has been shown to reduce inflammation and prevent the growth of bacteria that can cause acne. Additionally, curcumin helps to regulate the immune system and prevent the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines, which can contribute to acne development.
